embeds.title: Owner
embeds.description: You hold **absolute final authority** over The SnowHaven Empire. All departments, staff, and decisions ultimately fall under your oversight. Use this guide as your quick reference for daily operations.

fields.name: 📋 Core Responsibilities
fields.value:
• Final say on all major server decisions
• Managing the founding team, Co-Owner, and Executives
• Approving rule changes and server policy updates
• Overseeing partnerships and external relations
• Handling severe cases: staff dismissals, permanent bans with no appeal
• Maintaining long-term community health and direction

fields.name: 🔑 Admin Panel Access
fields.value:
The TSHE website admin panel gives you direct control over all site content, maintenance mode, rules, punishments, the staff guide, and more.

**URL:** https://tshe.noxxbot.com/admin
**Email:** Set in your `.env` file
**Password:** Set in your `.env` file

Sessions expire after **8 hours**. Keep credentials strictly private.

fields.name: ⚡ Authority Overview
fields.value:
• Full Discord server permissions
• Override any staff decision at any level
• Hire, demote, or remove any staff member
• Modify any channel, role, or server setting
• Access all private staff channels and audit logs

fields.name: 🚨 When to Act Directly
fields.value:
• Active raids that Head Admins cannot contain
• Staff misconduct at Executive level or above
• Decisions affecting the entire server structure
• Legal concerns or serious real-world safety issues
• Partnership disputes or major community-wide drama
• Any situation where a Co-Owner has requested escalation

fields.name: 📞 Escalation — Who Reports to You
fields.value:
**Co-Owner →** You
**Head Executive →** Co-Owner or You directly

For routine moderation, let the chain handle it. Intervene only when escalated or when the situation is critical.

fields.name: 🌐 Key Links
fields.value:
🔗 [Admin Panel](https://tshe.noxxbot.com/admin) — Site management
📜 [Rules Page](https://tshe.noxxbot.com/rules) — Community rules
🛡️ [Staff Guide](https://tshe.noxxbot.com/staff) — Public role guide
⚖️ [Appeal System](https://appeal.gg/s/1466990155020898413) — Ban appeals
